scripts.docker:test: docker build -t frontend . && docker run -p 8080:80 -e VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://mathtutor-agent-backend-1087118236338.us-central1.run.app frontend
scripts.deploy: gcloud run deploy ai-agent-frontend --image gcr.io/math-tutor-live/frontend:latest --platform managed --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated --set-env-vars VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://mathtutor-agent-backend-1087118236338.us-central1.run.app --project math-tutor-live --tag gcr.io/math-tutor-live/frontend:latest && gcloud run services update-traffic ai-agent-frontend --to-latest --project math-tutor-live --region us-central1
scripts.push: docker tag frontend gcr.io/math-tutor-live/frontend:latest && docker push gcr.io/math-tutor-live/frontend:latest
